description: The BitmapAssetMetadata component is used to get pixel data information on a given image or texture.

fields.Asset: The image to get data from.
fields.BitsPerPixel: How many bits are used per pixel to store color data in ``Asset``.
fields.ChannelCount: How many channels ``Asset`` has (RGBA for example is 4, but some images may have more or less.)
fields.AverageHSV: ``Asset``'s average HSV color, visible ot not.
fields.InvalidPixelCount: how many pixels in ``Asset`` that have NAN values in their color values.
